rows.label: qev060603_MSG0001
rows.name:
Please wait, Vera... I want to become
friends with you. So why do you reject me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060603_MSG0002
rows.name:
I told you earlier, didn't I? I don't
like the way you live your life, being
tied down by some mission or whatever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060603_MSG0003
rows.name:
Feeling that way, I can't just
smile and hang out with you!
Right? Please understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060603_MSG0004
rows.name:
As long as I was born a Zaruboggan, I
cannot deviate from that destiny...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060603_MSG0005
rows.name:
However, I find that aspect of you
favorable. Favorable enough to make
me want to revoltant, even.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060603_MSG0006
rows.name:
What do you mean by favorable!? And what
the heck is that revoltant thing!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060603_MSG0007
rows.name:
You don't understand me at all!
Listen... honestly, you're annoying![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060603_MSG0009
rows.name:
I absolutely hate guys like
you! Goodbye! We'll probably
never see each other again![ST:wait ]
